answers: UPI (Unified Payments Interface) is a real-time payment system developed in India that allows instant money transfers between bank accounts using a mobile phone.
UPI holo India er instant payment system. Phone number ba UPI ID diye tatkhonath taka pathano jay. Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm popular UPI apps.
UPI works by linking your bank account to a UPI ID. You can send or receive money instantly 24/7 without needing account numbers or IFSC codes.
UPI is secured with device binding, UPI PIN, and encryption. Always keep your UPI PIN private and never share it with anyone to stay safe from fraud.

feelings.answer: Yes, Wi-Fi is a convenient way to connect to the internet without needing a physical cable connection. It stands for wireless fidelity and refers to the technology used in mobile devices that allow them to communicate wirelessly over short distances using radio waves.
